summary: Verified Account contract re-upload after approval (iteration 274). Backend correctly accepts re-upload at any status (approved/changes_requested/pending_review/rejected), bumps version, and resets status to pending_review (or 'revised' when prior was changes_requested). Frontend AccountDetail exposes the upload control across all statuses with correct dynamic labels and the approved reset-warning note. End-to-end UI re-upload of an approved contract worked: v1 approved -> UI upload -> v2 pending_review.
critical_code_review_comments: review_account_contract accepts action values 'approved'/'rejected'/'changes_requested' (past tense). The review request mentioned action='approve' which would 400 — minor wording mismatch only.
Backend hard-deletes prior contract on re-upload (no version history stored); consider archiving prior versions for audit if business requires.
seed_data_creation: Used existing account (account_id THER-HYD-A26-001 / internal id b529f00e-54b3-4709-92c1-db08137ef0b3 - 'The Rameshwaram Cafe'). Contract created and cleaned up after each test run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_274_contract_reupload.py (set REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env). It auto-picks an account without a contract or wipes contract of the first one. CEO has no reports_to so the approval-task-notification check is skipped; to verify task creation, run as a user with reports_to set.
rca of the issue: N/A — feature works end-to-end. The frontend canUploadNewContract flag (AccountDetail.js ~line 1015) correctly mirrors LeadDetail.canUploadNewProposal, and the generalized upload block (~line 3083) replaces the previous changes_requested-only condition. data-testid='replace-contract-input' is present and enabled; label is dynamic (Upload New Contract / Upload Revised Contract / Replace Contract); reset warning shown when status='approved'.
